name: Security Federal Savings Bank Of Mcminnville
description_short: Security Federal Savings Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in McMinnville, Tennessee, offering checking, savings, loans, and mortgage services.
description_long:
Security Federal Savings Bank operates as a traditional community bank serving customers in the McMinnville area. The institution is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to applicable limits. The bank maintains an online presence at secfed.net and can be reached at (931) 473-4483 for customer inquiries.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of consumer banking and lending products. These include personal checking and savings accounts, mobile banking with balance transfers and bill pay capabilities, mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing, consumer loans across multiple purposes, debit card services, and online account management tools. Customers can also access financial advisory services and use online tools such as financial calculators and check reordering. The bank provides branch and ATM locator services for convenient access.

Security Federal emphasizes personal service and community relationships, branding itself as the "friendliest bank in town" and highlighting its team of tellers and loan officers. The bank demonstrates commitment to customer security by explicitly warning customers that the institution will never request personal information, account details, passwords, or PINs via unsolicited calls, emails, or texts. The website includes prominent fraud prevention guidance regarding phishing scams and text message threats.

As a regional community bank, Security Federal's primary strength lies in personalized local service rather than cutting-edge digital innovation or extensive product differentiation. The bank appears to serve a traditional retail banking market focused on residential customers and consumer lending rather than commercial or investment banking. Website content is functional but basic, lacking detailed product specifications, rate information, or competitive positioning data that would appeal to rate-shopping or feature-focused customers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking with balance transfers and bill pay
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full federal backing
Mobile banking app available for balance checks, transfers, and bill payments
Multiple branch and ATM locations accessible via online locator
Online mortgage calculator and financial planning tools provided
Comprehensive consumer loan options available beyond mortgages
Online account management with check reordering and travel notice features
Strong fraud prevention messaging and customer security focus
cons: No specific rates, fees, or product terms disclosed on website
Limited online banking features compared to national banks or neobanks
No information about minimum deposit requirements or account types
Website lacks details on competitive advantages or loan approval criteria
No evidence of investment accounts, business banking, or advanced financial services
best_for: McMinnville and regional Tennessee residents seeking traditional community banking
Borrowers looking for personalized mortgage and consumer loan service
Customers preferring face-to-face banking relationships with local staff
diagnosis: Security Federal Savings Bank is best for customers in the McMinnville, Tennessee area seeking traditional community banking with personalized service and local branch access. The main caveat is that specific product rates, fees, and detailed terms are not available online, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for pricing and account comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
